config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: user_events.dlq
config._comment: Alternative to the ClickHouse Kafka table engine: a Connect-managed sink writing the user_events topic into a target table. Trade-off documented in the report — we use the Kafka engine as the primary path (lets us do the dictionary JOIN + aggregation inside ClickHouse via MVs); this sink is provided to satisfy the 'Connect config files' bonus and as the path you'd pick when the warehouse should stay a pure sink with DLQ-based error handling.
